'''lojataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:docosapentaenoic|docosapentaenoic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docosapentaenoic|docosapentaenoic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lojataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojatithi|lojatithi]] || [[word:lojatiji|lojatiji]] || [[word:lojatishi|lojatishi]] || [[word:lojatiki|lojatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojatuthuthu|lojatuthuthu]] || [[word:lojatujuju|lojatujuju]] || [[word:lojatushushu|lojatushushu]] || [[word:lojatukuku|lojatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojatuthu|lojatuthu]] || [[word:lojatuju|lojatuju]] || [[word:lojatushu|lojatushu]] || [[word:lojatuku|lojatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojatufthuf|lojatufthuf]] || [[word:lojatufjuf|lojatufjuf]] || [[word:lojatufshuf|lojatufshuf]] || [[word:lojatufkuf|lojatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojatethe|lojatethe]] || [[word:lojateje|lojateje]] || [[word:lojateshe|lojateshe]] || [[word:lojateke|lojateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojatothotho|lojatothotho]] || [[word:lojatojojo|lojatojojo]] || [[word:lojatoshosho|lojatoshosho]] || [[word:lojatokoko|lojatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojatotho|lojatotho]] || [[word:lojatojo|lojatojo]] || [[word:lojatosho|lojatosho]] || [[word:lojatoko|lojatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojatofthof|lojatofthof]] || [[word:lojatofjof|lojatofjof]] || [[word:lojatofshof|lojatofshof]] || [[word:lojatofkof|lojatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojat챦fth챦f|lojat챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fj챦f|lojat챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fsh챦f|lojat챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fk챦f|lojat챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojat챦fth챦fth챦f|lojat챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fj챦fj챦f|lojat챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fsh챦fsh챦f|lojat챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fk챦fk챦f|lojat챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojat챦fth챦f|lojat챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fj챦f|lojat챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fsh챦f|lojat챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fk챦f|lojat챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojat챦fth챦f|lojat챦fth챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fj챦f|lojat챦fj챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fsh챦f|lojat챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:lojat챦fk챦f|lojat챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lojat챈th챈|lojat챈th챈]] || [[word:lojat챈j챈|lojat챈j챈]] || [[word:lojat챈sh챈|lojat챈sh챈]] || [[word:lojat챈k챈|lojat챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lojatathatha|lojatathatha]] || [[word:lojatajaja|lojatajaja]] || [[word:lojatashasha|lojatashasha]] || [[word:lojatakaka|lojatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lojatatha|lojatatha]] || [[word:lojataja|lojataja]] || [[word:lojatasha|lojatasha]] || [[word:lojataka|lojataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lojatafthaf|lojatafthaf]] || [[word:lojatafjaf|lojatafjaf]] || [[word:lojatafshaf|lojatafshaf]] || [[word:lojatafkaf|lojatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lojatasha|lojatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojatsh챘sha|lojatsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojatrosha|lojatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojatmusha|lojatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojatyasha|lojatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojatnksh챘sha|golojatnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojatnkrosha|golojatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojatnkmusha|golojatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojatnkyasha|golojatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lojajatasha|lojajatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojajatsh챘sha|lojajatsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojajatrosha|lojajatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojajatmusha|lojajatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojajatyasha|lojajatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojajatnksh챘sha|golojajatnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojajatnkrosha|golojajatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojajatnkmusha|golojajatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojajatnkyasha|golojajatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lej챈tasha|lej챈tasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lej챈tsh챘sha|lej챈tsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lej챈trosha|lej챈trosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lej챈tmusha|lej챈tmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lej챈tyasha|lej챈tyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golej챈tnksh챘sha|golej챈tnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golej챈tnkrosha|golej챈tnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golej챈tnkmusha|golej챈tnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golej챈tnkyasha|golej챈tnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lojfatasha|lojfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lojfatsh챘sha|lojfatsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lojfatrosha|lojfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lojfatmusha|lojfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lojfatyasha|lojfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golojfatnksh챘sha|golojfatnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golojfatnkrosha|golojfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golojfatnkmusha|golojfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golojfatnkyasha|golojfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
